Michael S. Burke of Vogl & Meredith, LLP, 398-0200, appearing for defendant

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HENRY OHLHOFF HOUSE'S Motion To Strike Exhibit denied. Plaintiff is given leave to file and serve first amended complaint.
